overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a first-person walk through dense coastal vegetation emerging onto a grassy cliff edge, revealing a panoramic view of a misty ocean with rocky outcrops and a distant sunlit coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coastal vegetation path approaching cliff edge

events.description: camera breaks through dense vegetation onto open cliff edge revealing expansive ocean vista

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and bushes toward the coastline, pushing through dense foliage

entered.detail: tall green grass and leafy bushes surrounding the path, partially obscuring the view ahead
steep gray rock face forming the left boundary of the path
calm blue sea visible through gaps in the vegetation ahead
dark rock formations rising from the water surface in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view moving through dense coastal vegetation. Tall grass and bushes fill the frame, with a rocky cliff wall on the left and glimpses of the ocean ahead. The camera walks steadily forward through the foliage until breaking through at the end to reveal the open cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy cliff edge overlooking expansive misty ocean

events.description: direct sunlight becomes visible as camera emerges from vegetation shadow, creating lens flare
camera slows and begins panning right to reveal the coastline extending into the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge and observing the panoramic ocean view, pausing to take in the coastal scenery

entered.detail: bright sun high in the sky creating strong glare and reflections on the water surface
distant foggy shoreline with steep forested cliffs extending along the horizon
boulders and rocks lining the water's edge along the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an open grassy cliff overlooking a vast ocean. The bright sun creates sparkling reflections on the water, with rocky outcrops visible in the bay. As the camera moves along the cliff edge and pans right, a misty coastline with forested cliffs reveals itself in the distance, while the rocky shoreline becomes prominent on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the claustrophobic interior of coastal scrubland out toward a sweeping oceanic vista. It begins by pushing through dense tall grass and bushes, guided by a rocky cliff wall on the left and fleeting glimpses of the sea. As the camera breaks through the thick foliage, the environment suddenly opens onto a wide, grassy cliff edge overlooking a vast ocean. The scene then expands as the camera pans right, shifting from the sparkling reflections of the sun on the water to a panoramic view of a misty, forested coastline and a rugged rocky shoreline.
